title: 00_MODULE_RULES
description: JSON Schema Draft-07 for HB Track module delta governance documents. Sovereign fields (execution_phases, exit_codes, skip_policy, aggregation_policy, merge_policy, global_type_system, rule_sets) are blocked via additionalProperties=false.

module_id.description: UPPER-CASE in contracts (e.g. 'ATLETAS'). lower-case only in filesystem paths (e.g. '.../modulos/atletas/...'). This asymmetry is intentional.

additional_cannot_waive.description: Additional rule_ids that cannot be waived in this module (merged with engine cannot_waive).

extra_python_disposition.description: extra_python_disposition e declarado explicitamente para checkers Python que nao tem entrada JSON no engine (PROMOTE/DEFER/REJECT). Chaves sao checker_ids; valores definem action e target_execution_phase.
